=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan	
Moncton Coliseum
Moncton, New Brunswick, Canada
8 August 2002

No info about lineage and taper. Great sound


1 I Am The Man, Thomas (acoustic), 2 Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues (acoustic) (Larry on pedal steel), 3 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic), 4 Masters Of War (acoustic) (Charlie on dobro and Bob on harp), 5 Cry A While (Larry on slide guitar), 6 Moonlight (Tony on standup bass), 7 I Don't Believe You (She Acts Like We Never Have Met), 8 High Water (For Charley Patton), 9 Tomorrow Is A Long Time (acoustic) (Bob on harp), 10 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) (Charlie on dobro and Larry on cittern), 11 My Back Pages (acoustic)(Larry on fiddle and Bob on harp),



1 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass), 2 Never Gonna Be The Same Again (Larry on pedal steel), 3 The Wicked Messenger (Bob on harp), 4 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 (Larry on steel guitar), 5 Like A Rolling Stone, 6 Honest With Me (Larry on slide guitar), 7 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic), 8 All Along The Watchtower 



Concert # 1435 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 5 of the 2002 US Summer Tour. 2002 concert # 52.
Concert # 36 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

1–4, 9-11, 18 acoustic with the band.
4, 9, 11, 14 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2, 13 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
4, 10 Charlie Sexton (dobro).
5, 17 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
10 Larry Campbell (cittern).
11 Larry Campbell (fiddle).
15 Larry Campbell (steel guitar).
1, 18 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

Note. First acoustic live version of Just Like Tom Thumb’s Blues.
9 new songs (47%) compared to previous concert. 3 new songs for this tour.
